first-preview-deployment.prTitle: Your first preview deployment, created by the Vercel bot
first-preview-deployment.prBody:
### Hello, I’m the Vercel bot.

To update your Vercel Starter Kit page, I created a new branch, pushed some changes, and opened this pull request.

This creates a **preview deployment** on Vercel.

### Click “Visit Preview” on the comment below to check it out.

**Note:** You can still click **“Visit Preview”** while it’s **🔄 Building**, and the page will load when it becomes **✅ Ready**.
first-preview-deployment.commitMessage: Update text to talk about preview deployment

smaller-triangle.prComment:
We just pushed a commit to make the triangle smaller. This creates a new preview deployment, which will be accessible via the same URL.

### On the comment above, wait until the status changes from 🔄 Building to ✅ Ready, and then click “Visit Preview”.

**Note:** If you had written a comment on the preview deployment, notice that the status check is ❌ failing below. This will be fixed when we resolve the comment.

merge-comment.prComment:
### Click “Merge Pull Request” to merge the pull request. 

This will create a new production deployment. Then, click on the link below to see the deployment progress on the Vercel dashboard.

### [https://vercel.com/upgrade/starter-kit/{{teamSlug}}](https://vercel-site-git-chibicode-life-4346-create-a-demo-for-de-c94e2a.vercel.sh/upgrade/starter-kit/{{teamSlug}})

**Note:** Clicking the above link will show a modal asking you to try the **Pro trial.**

So far, you’ve collaborated with the Vercel bot using pull requests and preview comments. However, to collaborate with other developers, you need to be on the Pro plan. [Learn more on the Vercel pricing page](https://vercel.com/pricing).
